zod.too_small.set: {minimum, plural, =1 {Must contain at least 1 element} other {Must contain at least # elements}}

zod.too_small.file: {minimum, plural, =1 {Must be at least 1 byte} other {Must be at least # bytes}}
zod.too_small.file.exact: {minimum, plural, =1 {Must be exactly 1 byte} other {Must be exactly # bytes}}
zod.too_small.date: Date must be {inclusive, select, true {on or after} other {after}} {minimum}

zod.too_big.set: {maximum, plural, =1 {Must contain at most 1 element} other {Must contain at most # elements}}

zod.too_big.file.exact: {maximum, plural, =1 {Must be exactly 1 byte} other {Must be exactly # bytes}}
zod.too_big.date: Date must be {inclusive, select, true {on or before} other {before}} {maximum}
